name: Al Nevins
abstract: Albert Nevins (born Albert Tepper; May 3, 1915 – January 25, 1965) was an American musician, producer, arranger, guitarist and violinist. He was also a member of pop trio The Three Suns, and is considered one of the major forces behind the evolution of the 1950s music into the early 1960s pop/rock music.

about_quotes.speaker: Bucky Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: the guitar player was unable to play, Al Nevins, and I jumped in and subbed for him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bucky Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]
